title: Better Forgeron
description: A unique runes system. Apply rune to equipment to increase stats
body:
# Presentation

## What's Better Forgeron ?
Better Forgeron add/enable the possiblity to increase stats of your armors or equipment.

## How ?
1. Go to your Creative Inventory in Ingredients Group and takes some runes
2. Generaly in the name of rune, you have an indice of where the rune take effect. Hand / Chest.
3. Open the anvil and place a sword in the first slot, place a Hand rune in the second slot. The arrow in the GUI change color. You can click on it to craft the item

## Gameplay Warning
Placing a rune on an item can fail. You start with 90% of chance to successfully place a rune but more you have stats on your item and more the rune is big (ex: PA Runes) Less you have chance to place rune.
When it fail, a different sound event happend. Note to myself: Change the sound to represent a Fail

## Modpack
You can use it in a modpack but notify me at "hermannvincent" on discord, i would like to know where my mod is used and get feedback from you to update / fix bugs
